title: Dense Crispy Topped Peruvian Lomo Saltado Suspiro-Limeno
description: A hearty, savory Peruvian dish featuring tender beef, crispy onions, and whole black peppercorns, served in a tandoor clay pot.
instructions: Heat the tandoor clay pot over medium-high heat.
Add the sesame oil and swirl to coat the bottom of the pot.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Add the onion, bell pepper, and garlic, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the black peppercorns, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
Transfer the beef and vegetable mixture to a plate and set aside.
Add a small amount of oil to the pot and swirl to coat the bottom.
Add the sliced onion and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the beef and vegetable mixture in the bottom of the pot, followed by a spoonful of the crispy onion topping.
Repeat this process until the pot is full, finishing with a layer of crispy onion on top.
